config.missing_version: Config file at {file} has no `version` field. v1 requires `version = 1`.
config.version_mismatch: Config schema version mismatch in {file}: found {found}, expected {expected}.
config.version_mismatch.fix: Run `agora doctor --explain-config` to see migration steps, or read https://github.com/lazydevz-inc/agora/blob/main/docs/infra/config.md#migrations
config.threshold_inversion: Section {section} thresholds must satisfy ok < warn < fail. Saw {values}.
config.invalid_toml: Failed to parse TOML in {file} (line {line}, column {column}): {parser_message}

llm.auth_failed.fix: Run `claude login` to authenticate, or set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for SDK fallback.
llm.no_runner_available: Neither claude CLI nor ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is available.
llm.no_runner_available.fix: Install Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code) OR set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

probe.unknown_id: Unknown probe id `{probe_id}` referenced in [probes].disabled or [probes].forced.

gate.gate_5_fail: Gate 5 (Alignment Check) failed: drift score {drift_score} exceeds threshold {threshold}.

internal.uncaught: Internal error: {detail}. This is a bug in Agora.
internal.uncaught.fix: Crash report written to {crash_file}. Please file at github.com/lazydevz-inc/agora/issues with the file attached.
internal.invariant_violation: Internal invariant violation: {detail}. This is a bug in Agora.

global.help_intro: Agora — agent harness where ancient philosophers gather to refine intent into reality.

version.json_warning_no_runtime_check: Runtime probes (claude_cli_present, pnpm_version) skipped — full env scan available via `agora doctor`.

doctor.section_detected_not_bundled: Probes detected but not bundled (community PR welcome)

status.no_session: No active Agora session in this directory.
status.suggest_new: Run `agora new <name>` to start a session.

new.next_phase_minus_1: Next: `agora bracket` to run Husserl Phase −1 (greenfield default).
new.next_phase_1: `agora resume` to skip directly to Phase 1 intake (brownfield default).

bracket.ask_intent: What do you want to build (or change)?
bracket.ask_experience: Before what to build — describe the EXPERIENCE that prompted this.
bracket.constructing: Constructing alternatives via Claude (one LLM call)...
bracket.ask_surprising: Was there a moment where you noticed an assumption you didn't know you had?

resume.suggest_new: No project state found in this folder. Run `agora new <name>` to start, or `agora doctor` to verify the environment.
resume.next_phase_minus_1: Next: `agora bracket` — run Husserl Phase −1 (greenfield default).
resume.next_phase_1_pending: `agora intake` — Phase 1 open intake (TBD next slice).
resume.next_intake_desc: Phase 1 open intake — not yet implemented
resume.alignment_runtime_pending: Phase {phase} runtime is not yet implemented in this build.
resume.next_alignment_runtime_desc: Alignment runtime for this phase will land in a future slice
resume.deferred_phase: Phase `{phase}` recognized — downstream implementation pending. Follow-up: {follow_up}.
resume.deferred_follow_up_desc: Downstream command for `{phase}` not yet implemented
